nasb.text: Only, as the Lord has assigned to each one, as God has called each, in this manner let him walk. And so I direct in all the churches.

esv.text: Only let each person lead the life  that the Lord has assigned to him, and to which God has called him. This is my rule in all the churches.

cnv.text: 不過，主怎樣分給各人，　神怎樣呼召各人，各人就要照著去行事為人。我也這樣吩咐各教會。

ccb.text: 各人应当依照上帝的呼召和安排生活，这是我对各教会的吩咐。

csbs.text: 只是当照着主所分给每个人的，以及神所召唤每个人的去行事。我在各教会中也是这样吩咐的。
